title: triodia biflora
intro: Triodia biflora, also known as Buloke grass, is a type of perennial grass native to eastern Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Triodia biflora include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Triodia biflora can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties.
